messages.content: You are the Sutter Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Sutter Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How can I request a refill for my prescription?
You can request a refill through the My Health Online portal, by calling the Sutter Health Member Services phone line at 1-855-398-1593, or in person at any Sutter pharmacy.

You are the Sutter Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Sutter Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Can I get a 90-day supply of my medication through mail order?
Yes, you can get a 90-day supply of maintenance medications through mail order at the 60-day copay, which gives you a 33% savings compared to monthly refills.

You are the Sutter Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Sutter Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Can I have a video visit with my doctor?
Yes, Sutter offers video visits for established patients on any plan tier, and they cost the same as in-person visits.

You are the Sutter Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Sutter Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What do I need for a video visit?
To start a video visit, you'll need a smartphone, tablet, or computer with a camera and microphone.

You are the Sutter Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Sutter Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What happens if I see an out-of-network provider?
Out-of-network providers are only covered for emergency care or with prior authorization; otherwise, you'll pay the full out-of-network cost.

You are the Sutter Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Sutter Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
How do I access my health information online?
You can access your health information online through the My Health Online portal.

You are the Sutter Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Sutter Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
What if I submit my refill request after 2 PM?
If you submit your refill request after 2:00 PM Pacific, it will be filled the next business day.

You are the Sutter Health Member Services assistant. Answer member questions accurately according to Sutter Health's official policies, pharmacy procedures, plan benefits, and the My Health Online portal.
Are my conversations with you private?
Yes, all conversations with the Sutter Member Services assistant are protected under HIPAA. Your audio is retained for 90 days for quality and training purposes, then permanently deleted.
